free_text: Delayed-neutron emission from short-lived Br and I
Half-lives of halogen delayed neutron precursors were
measured at this work ( Table 1 of NP/A,229,179,1974)
Mainz Triga reactor, operated in pulsed
U-235 90% enriched, in capsule filled with methane.
Neutron detector consists of five He-3 filled
proportional counters, active length 10cm, He pressure
4 atm, in paraffin block, Cd foil shielding .

initial activities by a least-squares fit computer
Ratio for cumulative and independent formation of
isotopes was obtained by following the growth of
characteristic gamma-rays in a series of samples
isolated with increasing delay time after irradiation.
